title: Alert Trends
description: Predictive alert frequency analysis — rising, stable, or falling trends across the fleet and per vessel.

list.name: vessel
list.label: Vessel
list.query: SELECT imo_nr AS __value, name || ' (' || imo_nr || ')' AS __text FROM udslocations ORDER BY name;

panels.title: Alert Frequency Over Time
panels.description: Number of new alerts per 4-hour bucket. A rising pattern suggests worsening conditions.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_bucket('4 hours', al.starts_at) AS time,
  COUNT(*)::int AS "Alert Count"
FROM alerts al
JOIN udslocations u ON u.id = al.uds_location_id
WHERE al.starts_at >= $__timeFrom()
  AND al.starts_at <= $__timeTo()
  AND ('${vessel}' = '' OR '$__all' = '${vessel}' OR u.imo_nr = '${vessel}')
  AND ('${severity}' = '' OR '$__all' = '${severity}' OR LOWER(al.severity) = LOWER('${severity}'))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time ASC;

panels.title: Alert Frequency by Vessel
panels.description: Per-vessel alert counts over time to compare which vessels are trending worse.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_bucket('4 hours', al.starts_at) AS time,
  u.name AS metric,
  COUNT(*)::int AS value
FROM alerts al
JOIN udslocations u ON u.id = al.uds_location_id
WHERE al.starts_at >= $__timeFrom()
  AND al.starts_at <= $__timeTo()
  AND ('${severity}' = '' OR '$__all' = '${severity}' OR LOWER(al.severity) = LOWER('${severity}'))
GROUP BY time, u.name
ORDER BY time ASC;

panels.title: Alert Severity Breakdown
panels.description: Distribution of alert severities over time. Watch for increasing critical alerts.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_bucket('4 hours', al.starts_at) AS time,
  al.severity AS metric,
  COUNT(*)::int AS value
FROM alerts al
JOIN udslocations u ON u.id = al.uds_location_id
WHERE al.starts_at >= $__timeFrom()
  AND al.starts_at <= $__timeTo()
  AND ('${vessel}' = '' OR '$__all' = '${vessel}' OR u.imo_nr = '${vessel}')
GROUP BY time, al.severity
ORDER BY time ASC;

panels.title: Current Trend Summary
panels.description: Quick summary of whether alert activity is rising, stable, or falling in recent windows.

targets.rawSql:
WITH buckets AS (
  SELECT
    u.name AS vessel,
    CASE
      WHEN al.starts_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 hours' THEN 'recent'
      ELSE 'earlier'
    END AS period,
    COUNT(*)::int AS cnt
  FROM alerts al
  JOIN udslocations u ON u.id = al.uds_location_id
  WHERE al.starts_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  GROUP BY u.name, period
)
SELECT
  vessel AS "Vessel",
  COALESCE(MAX(cnt) FILTER (WHERE period = 'earlier'), 0) AS "Alerts (12-24h ago)",
  COALESCE(MAX(cnt) FILTER (WHERE period = 'recent'), 0) AS "Alerts (last 12h)",
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(MAX(cnt) FILTER (WHERE period = 'recent'), 0) >
         COALESCE(MAX(cnt) FILTER (WHERE period = 'earlier'), 0) * 1.25
    THEN 'RISING'
    WHEN COALESCE(MAX(cnt) FILTER (WHERE period = 'recent'), 0) <
         COALESCE(MAX(cnt) FILTER (WHERE period = 'earlier'), 0) * 0.75
    THEN 'FALLING'
    ELSE 'STABLE'
  END AS "Trend"
FROM buckets
GROUP BY vessel
ORDER BY vessel;
